name: Chengwen Song
bio: Research focuses on organizational administration, the digital transformation of SMEs, and developing cognitive-psychological models within human-AI interaction frameworks.

name: Yang Hu
bio: Specializes in the digital transformation of SMEs, artificial intelligence ethics, international education strategy, and organizational sustainable innovation.

name: Marcus Thorne
bio: Expert in public administration and policy analysis, with a focus on institutional governance and digital forensics in state structures.
